track_ratman.name: Track Ratman
track_ratman.description: A Ratman raised on railway waste. They roam in packs, seeking to steal fragments of the deceased.

snare_spider.name: Snare Spider
snare_spider.description: Hides between ceiling pipes and exhales soul chains. Trapped prey slowly have their essence drained.

cocoon_human.name: Cocooned Human
cocoon_human.description: A wraith trapped by spiders long ago. No trace of personality remains.

filth_slime.name: Filth Slime
filth_slime.description: A condensed mass of waste from the dead. Resistant to physical attacks and corrodes everything it touches.

ghoul.name: Contaminated Ghoul
ghoul.description: A ghost once fused with Belphegor. Its self-awareness was lost long ago.

derailed_ghost.name: Derailed Ghost
derailed_ghost.description: A vengeful spirit whose lower body is entangled with subway wheels. It drags heavy iron, crushing everything in its path.

ichor_flies.name: Ichor Fly Swarm
ichor_flies.description: A swarm of small flies that chase the scent of blood. Weak individually, but continuously drain vitality.

suspicious_turtle.name: Suspicious Turtle
suspicious_turtle.description: A red-hooded turtle that seems to have soaked up evil energy instead of radiation in the sewers. Strangely obsessed with ninja techniques and pizza.

shipyard_worker.name: Shipyard Worker
shipyard_worker.description: A worker with sunken eyes due to harsh labor and poor conditions. Attempts to pull targets in with a rusty hook.

shipyard_guard.name: Shipyard Guard
shipyard_guard.description: A low-ranking guard belonging to the Bureau. Pushes enemies back with a standardized shield.

shipyard_guard_no_gain.name: Shipyard Guard
shipyard_guard_no_gain.description: A low-ranking guard belonging to the Bureau. Pushes enemies back with a standardized shield.

security_sensor_drone.name: Security Sensor Drone
security_sensor_drone.description: Floats in the air, scanning for intruders with a red laser. Locks onto targets and calls for guards.

shipyard_hound.name: Shipyard Hound
shipyard_hound.description: A hound implanted with sharp metal teeth. Bites the Achilles tendon to significantly reduce movement speed.

ratman_scout.name: Ratman Scout
ratman_scout.description: A rat-kin hiding in the darkness. Obscures vision with smoke bombs and throws poisoned daggers.

ratman_shaman.name: Ratman Shaman
ratman_shaman.description: A shaman who worships discarded mana stone fragments. Interferes with magical actions using a scrap metal curse.

mutated_worker.name: Mutated Shipyard Worker
mutated_worker.description: A monster bloated by pollutants. Delivers heavy slams while absorbing the target's vitality.

shipyard_supervisor.name: Shipyard Supervisor
shipyard_supervisor.description: A ruthless administrator. Increases unit aggression and summons reinforcements via emergency call.

cargo_thief.name: Cargo Thief
cargo_thief.description: A looter who infiltrated the security network. Approaches while stealthed to steal belongings.

oil_sludge_slime.name: Oil Sludge Slime
oil_sludge_slime.description: A creature made of oil residue. Coats the floor in oil to hinder all movement.

golem_left_arm.name: Golem's Crushing Left Arm
golem_left_arm.description: A left arm equipped with a massive metal pincer. Blunt but exerts enough pressure to shatter bones once it grabs hold.

golem_right_arm.name: Golem's Hydraulic Right Arm
golem_right_arm.description: A hydraulic arm with a built-in flamethrower. Roasts approaching intruders with high-heat flames.

golem_chest_armor.name: Golem's Chest Armor Plate
golem_chest_armor.description: Thick armor protecting the core power source. Only powerful explosive impacts can shake the internal structure.

golem_core.name: Golem Core
golem_core.description: The core power source of the Golem.

guardbot_sebastian.name: Automaton 'Sebastian'
guardbot_sebastian.description: A heavy-duty guard bot personally owned by a noble.

modified_fury_hound.name: Drugged Fury Hound
modified_fury_hound.description: A beast that has lost its reason. It pursues relentlessly, making escape impossible.

clinging_concierge.name: Clinging Concierge
clinging_concierge.description: Refuses to let go of guests even in death. Escape is impossible as long as this wraith is present.

corrupted_noble_wraith.name: Corrupted Noble Wraith
corrupted_noble_wraith.description: A spirit shrouded in powerful spiritual energy. Unleashes magic immediately upon spotting a player.

masked_intruder_wraith.name: Masked Phantom Thief
masked_intruder_wraith.description: A wraith seeking treasure. Highly agile, with a high probability of striking first.

security_guard.name: Terminal Security Guard
security_guard.description: A biological security agent patrolling the lounge. An excellent source of corpses.

security_guard_no_gain.name: Terminal Security Guard
security_guard_no_gain.description: A biological security agent patrolling the lounge. An excellent source of corpses.

security_priest.name: Terminal Security Priest
security_priest.description: A medical agent who restores the bodies of security personnel using nanomachines. Possesses biological tissue for corpse utilization.

security_priest_no_gain.name: Terminal Security Priest
security_priest_no_gain.description: A medical agent who restores the bodies of security personnel using nanomachines. Possesses biological tissue for corpse utilization.

security_sharpshooter.name: Terminal Security Sharpshooter
security_sharpshooter.description: A biological security agent snipes intruders from the upper lounge. Less durable than guards but possesses higher attack power.

optical_surveillance_unit.name: Optical Surveillance Unit
optical_surveillance_unit.description: A real-time monitoring machine. It is the first to sound the alarm (strike first).

arka.name: Arka, Lesser God of Justice
arka.description: A low-ranking celestial administrator governing order and preservation. He values the safety of the elite and standardized justice over mortal lives.

nivalis.name: Nivalis, High Elemental
nivalis.description: A ruthless ice spirit who executes Arka's will. Absolute zero frost flows around him, freezing any unauthorized movement in his presence.

resistance_member.name: Resistance Member
resistance_member.description: Those who took up arms to end the tragic bargain with the Reaper.

resistance_priest.name: Resistance Priest
resistance_priest.description: One who offers prayers on the battlefield to soothe the souls of the forsaken.

fragment_of_dead_god_war.name: Shard of the Dead God [War]
fragment_of_dead_god_war.description: A fragment torn from the carcass of a fallen deity.

fragment_of_dead_god_mercy.name: Shard of the Dead God [Mercy]
fragment_of_dead_god_mercy.description: A fragment torn from the carcass of a fallen deity.

fragment_of_dead_god_wisdom.name: Shard of the Dead God [Wisdom]
fragment_of_dead_god_wisdom.description: A fragment torn from the carcass of a fallen deity.

fragment_of_dead_god_war_no_gain.name: Shard of the Dead God [War]
fragment_of_dead_god_war_no_gain.description: A fragment torn from the carcass of a fallen deity.

fragmented_thought_of_the_god.name: Fragmented Thought of the Dead God
fragmented_thought_of_the_god.description: A splinter of consciousness held by the deity during its lifetime.

fallen_god_1.name: Remnant of the Frenzied God
fallen_god_1.description: A creation fashioned from the corpse of a god.

fallen_god_2.name: Incomplete Godly Remnant
fallen_god_2.description: A result of Maya's attempt to craft using a god's corpse, though there was not enough time to perfect it.

maya_golem.name: Maya's Work Golem
maya_golem.description: A golem created by Maya, a member of the Resistance, for large-scale engineering tasks.
